title: Diagnose a low-recall retrieval pipeline
description: A systematic pass isolating whether low recall comes from embedding mismatch, index tuning, or chunking.
body: Use when a vector search misses obviously relevant documents. Do not jump to swapping the embedding model first — the cause is often index parameters or chunking. Actions: confirm query and index use the same embedder version, brute-force exact search on a sample to get true recall ceiling, compare ANN recall against it, then inspect chunk quality for missed hits. Validation signals include an exact-vs-ANN recall comparison isolating the gap and a chunk inspection on failing queries. Risk boundary: changing several variables at once hides the cause; if exact search also misses the document, escalate to chunking/embedding rather than blaming the ANN index.
